title: AFI SourceDisclosureProfile v1 (District 2 M1 DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION descriptive metadata about an evidence/data source: what kind of source it is, how much of it is disclosed, why parts are withheld, and how replayable it is. DESCRIPTIVE ONLY — District 2 defines computable metadata; BenchKit owns all weighting/evaluation policy. This schema MUST NOT encode reward weights, transparency bonuses, payout logic, or reputation effects, and additionalProperties:false rejects any such fields.
$comment: Boundary: fields here may be READ by downstream evaluation policy (BenchKit), but no evaluation/weighting semantics are defined or implied in this schema.
x-afiPartOf: AFI District 2 — Canonical Data & Provenance Boundary (D2 M1)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: District 2 D-17 decision — authorizes D2 M1 only (afi-config schema drafts and tests)
BenchKit owns weighting/evaluation policy; District 2 defines descriptive, computable metadata only

x-afiOpenItems.SDP-O1: sourceClass taxonomy — draft enum, expected to evolve; values here are proposals, not canon.
x-afiOpenItems.SDP-O2: licenseConstraint taxonomy — draft enum; 'custom' + notes covers everything else.

sourceId.description: Stable identifier for the source this profile describes. EvidenceRef.sourceRef and enrichment sourceDisclosureRefs point at this value.

sourceClass.description: Descriptive classification of the source (DRAFT taxonomy).

disclosureLevel.description: How much of the source's raw material is disclosed downstream. 'full' = raw payloads disclosable; 'partial' = some payloads/fields redacted; 'summary-only' = only derived summaries disclosed; 'withheld' = hash-only, no payload disclosure.

withheldReason.description: OPTIONAL categorical reason why material is withheld/redacted (meaningful when disclosureLevel is not 'full').

licenseConstraint.description: OPTIONAL license constraint governing redistribution of the source material (DRAFT taxonomy).

replayabilityLevel.description: How replayable observations from this source are. 'deterministic' = byte-identical re-fetch/re-derivation; 'pinned-inputs' = replayable from pinned snapshots/hashes; 'best-effort' = approximate replay only; 'non-replayable' = cannot be replayed.

providerAttestation.description: OPTIONAL descriptive attestation level for the source's provider. Describes what backing exists — carries no scoring semantics.

analystVisibleSummary.description: OPTIONAL human-readable summary of the source intended for analyst visibility.

validatorVisibleSummary.description: OPTIONAL human-readable summary of the source intended for validator visibility (may be narrower than the analyst summary).

qualityClaim.description: OPTIONAL descriptive quality claim made about the source. A claim, not a score: it carries no weights and has no defined reward, payout, or reputation effect.

statement.description: The quality claim itself, as a human-readable statement.

basis.description: OPTIONAL basis for the claim (methodology, sample, reference).

notes.description: OPTIONAL free-form descriptive notes about the source.
